texto: No more self-defeating device could be discovered than the one society has developed in dealing with the criminal. It proclaims his career in such loud and dramatic forms that both he and the community accept the judgment as a fixed description. He becomes conscious of himself as a criminal, and the community expects him to live up to his reputation, and will not credit him if he does not live up to it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Frank Tannenbaum sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “No more self-defeating device could be discovered than the one society has developed in dealing w…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, crime, criminal-justice, útil em momentos de criminal-justice e criminal-justice-system.
